name: Polyglutamic Acid
description: A moisture-binding peptide derived from fermented soybeans that holds 4000x its weight in water.
scientificSummary: Forms a hydrogel film on the skin's surface to prevent water evaporation.
mechanismOfAction: Forms a hydrogel film on the skin's surface to prevent water evaporation.

seo.title: Polyglutamic Acid - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Polyglutamic Acid in skincare.
